race_meta.race_name: Daily Profit Boosts At betmgm.co.uk Apprentice Handicap

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner always fearless (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Book Of Life with 29.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Book Of Life > Pessoa, but actual result was Always Fearless (IRE) > Pessoa. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
